report.summary: Cycle-close ~36m UTC offset — production stable on Hxo4eH166 (redeploy chain from d3bce36); 1b4a15e build failure persists for 4h+; 286 pages live (+2 vs last cycle); all 6 API routes healthy; carry-overs unchanged (rate limiting 0/6, fallback gaps 4/6, Vercel trial 9 days).

sections.title: QA
items: ✅ Production site returning Ready on current deployment Hxo4eH166 (4m 19s build, redeploy chain)
🔴 CARRY-OVER: Vercel build FAILED for 1b4a15e (D9UZMqaEz → Error, 2m 3s, 4h+ ago) — ecosystem/courses routes still not live
⚠️ TypeScript errors in src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts persist (TS1109/TS1005 JSX parse errors, lines 123–288) — non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors:true but should be cleaned up
⚠️ Missing page.tsx audit inconclusive this cycle (node script path error) — v2 report flagged ~100/284 missing; needs re-verification after build fix
✅ Last commit 1b4a15e content: ecosystem + courses routes committed, stargate JSX </html1> typo fixed, 23 files +3513/-2278 lines
✅ Smoke test file (tests/smoke.test.ts) updated in last commit (+248 lines) — expanded coverage for new routes

sections.title: Data Pipeline
items: ✅ All 6 public API routes present and structurally healthy: /api/prices, /api/fear-greed, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields
✅ Cache TTLs verified — prices: 60s, fear-greed: 600s (10min), trending: 300s (5min), market-dominance: 300s, market-metrics: 60s — all with stale-while-revalidate headers
✅ All routes confirmed to implement in-memory cache layer + stale fallback pattern
🔴 CARRY-OVER: Rate limiting (checkRateLimit) still 0/6 routes implemented — open since Sprint 38
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Hardcoded fallback data gaps remain — 4/6 routes (fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields) have no FALLBACK_DATA constant
✅ No rate limit errors or stale-cascade events detected in build logs this cycle

sections.title: DevOps
items: ✅ Current production: Hxo4eH166 — Ready, 4m 19s, deployed 36m ago (redeploy chain tracing to d3bce36 / Day 15 publish batch)
⚠️ 4 manual redeployments in last 4h — all bypassed failed 1b4a15e build; production code is still from d3bce36, NOT the Sprint 59 ecosystem fix
🔴 Platform alert: Vercel Pro trial expires in 10 days — payment method must be added to avoid interruption
⚠️ Dubai region (dxb1) still unavailable — Vercel auto-routing traffic, no user-facing impact confirmed
✅ Build times healthy and consistent: 4m 5s–4m 25s across all successful recent deploys (target <5min)
✅ No error spikes or anomalous latency patterns observed in deployment logs

sections.title: Project Manager
items: ✅ SHIPPED this cycle: 286 pages live (+2 vs 284 in last cycle), Day 15 publish promoted 3 learn guides (d3bce36)
✅ Sprint 59 code (1b4a15e) is committed: App Store v2, 176 dApps, ecosystem tabs, courses hub — awaiting build fix to go live
🔴 BLOCKER: 1b4a15e build failure must be diagnosed and fixed before Sprint 59 content reaches production (ecosystem 78 pages, courses routes)
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Rate limiting (0/6 routes) — unimplemented since Sprint 38, security gap
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Fallback data gaps (4/6 routes) — fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields
📌 ACTION for Jefe: (1) Add Vercel payment method within 9 days, (2) Diagnose 1b4a15e build error to unblock Sprint 59 launch, (3) Decide on missing page.tsx cleanup vs restoration
